case_title: KIRCHER, VINCENT vs. SPIEGL, DAVID E.

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT SPIEGL, DAVID  E.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, VINCENT SERVED JAN-19-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SPIEGL, DAVID  E.
